title: Show Durability HUD
description: A mod that adds a display of the strength of armor, tools, and the like. As well as warnings on the player's screen.
body:
A mod that adds a display of the strength of armor, tools, and the like.

As well as warnings on the player's screen.

This mod adds a user-friendly on-screen interface that is very flexible in the settings menu. The mod can help you and display useful information about the inside of the shalkers, and the strength of armor and items.

This mod will warn you about the attack of the enderman, or about the proximity of dynamite, if you start to run out of air underwater while you are busy with something. Thus, it will make the game easier for you and you can rely on it, because it will not be triggered falsely. No global changes are planned in future updates, and maybe only minor improvements.

You can also play on online servers!
